# Method selector

Use this selector before creating variants.

## If the goal is to understand current niche patterns

Use:

```text
M-GEN / Genoma creativum
```

Output:

```text
creative genome database
mechanism frequency table
top 20 repeatable patterns
```

## If the goal is to test one variable

Use:

```text
M-SVT / Variatio singularis
```

Example:

```text
same video body
A: no overlay
B: short overlay
C: heavy overlay
```

## If the goal is to test first frames or hooks

Use:

```text
M-MPT / Comparatio gemina
```

Example:

```text
same script/body
five first-frame variants
matched posting window
same platform surface
```

## If the goal is to test interactions

Use:

```text
M-FAC / Experimentum factoriale
```

Example:

```text
Factor 1: first frame = face / before-after
Factor 2: hook = problem / result
Factor 3: CTA = save / send
```

## If the goal is search durability

Use:

```text
M-SGA / Assay quaesitionis
```

Track:

```text
24h views
7d search traffic
30d search traffic
90d search traffic
search terms
saves
```

## If the goal is platform translation

Use:

```text
M-CST / Transitus platformae
```

Same thesis, different platform-native edit:

```text
TikTok = conversational/search/trend
Reels = sendability/identity
Shorts = first-frame clarity/search/subscriber conversion
```

## If the tactic is risky

Use:

```text
M-ROB / Falsificatio robusta
```

Guardrails:

```text
completion
negative comments
unfollows
low follow conversion
brand trust
```
